arts.ttl: Chelsea target three big-name signings if they get top four, including Arsenal target
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly eyeing up three big names this summer if they get the boost of qualifying for the Champions League. The Blues are not yet guaranteed to finish in the top four after a recent slump in form, so it remains to be seen if they’ll be able to sign the players they want. arts.ttl: “I’m convinced” – Arsenal player insists fans will create best-ever atmosphere
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Real Madrid later today in the first leg of the quarterfinals of the Champions League and the round could determine the fate of their season. arts.ttl: €200m double deal: Arsenal ready to invest in two game-changing transfers
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly ready to invest as much as €200million in two hugely ambitious transfers for their attack this summer. The Gunners need to make changes up front this summer after a disappointing season in which injuries have exposed their lack of depth in that area of their squad. arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres sends two-word message after fresh Arsenal transfer stance emerges
arts.sum: Arsenal-linked striker Viktor Gyokeres was on target again for Sporting CP as he continued his fine run of form for the Portuguese giants. Arsenal's new sporting director Andrea Berta is said to be an admirer of Gyokeres as they face a summer of intense links and speculation over a move.

arts.ttl: 'I quit Arsenal for Real Madrid – one club was a total nightmare and I hated it'
arts.sum: Former Premier League forward Nicolas Anelka left Arsenal to join Real Madrid in a blockbuster move back in 1999, but regretted it the second he touched down in the Spanish capital
